name: Luscious Caramel Banana Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Pour the sweetened condensed milk into an 8-inch pie plate.
2. Cover the pie plate with aluminum foil.
3. In a larger shallow pan, pour about 1/4 inch of hot water.
4. Place the covered pie plate in the pan with the hot water.
5. Bake at 425 degrees for 1 hour and 20 minutes or until the condensed milk is thick and caramel colored. Add hot water to the pan as needed.
6. Remove the foil when done, and set aside.
7. Arrange the banana slices on the crust.
8. Spread the caramelized milk over the bananas.
9. Cool for at least 30 minutes.
10. Beat the whipping cream until foamy. Gradually add the powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
11. Spread the whipped cream over the caramel layer.
12. Sprinkle with crumbled candy.
13. Chill for at least 3 hours or overnight before serving.
